name: Reduced FIRPTA Withholding for Mid-Market Residences

eligibility.description: Property must be used as a residence and the amount realized must be between $300,001 and $1,000,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the FIRPTA withholding rate from 15% to 10% for the purchase of a residence from a foreign person.
